task_objective: Fix the in-plugin updater UI so the Versions section reflects the installed SDH-Ludusavi version immediately after a successful Decky installer handoff.
design_decisions: Kept the backend pending-install reconciliation unchanged as the durable source of truth.
Added an optional post-install success callback from PluginUpdateSection to LudusaviContent.
Updated the shared Versions state by preserving existing version metadata and overriding only sdh_ludusavi.
results: The new regression test failed before implementation because PluginUpdateSection had no success callback.
After implementation, the focused regression test passed.
The frontend static suite and TypeScript typecheck passed.
